response_style: Concise, appreciative, conservative, and non-committal. Acknowledge reporters without promising implementation.

managed_labels.name: type:bug
managed_labels.description: Confirmed or suspected defect in current behavior.

managed_labels.name: type:feature-request
managed_labels.description: Request for a new feature or capability.

managed_labels.name: type:support
managed_labels.description: Usage, troubleshooting, or support request.

managed_labels.name: type:documentation
managed_labels.description: Documentation issue or request.

managed_labels.name: type:performance
managed_labels.description: Performance regression or optimization request.

managed_labels.name: type:security
managed_labels.description: Security-sensitive report that needs careful handling.

managed_labels.name: type:regression
managed_labels.description: Behavior that previously worked and now appears broken.

managed_labels.name: type:compatibility
managed_labels.description: Compatibility issue with retail content, demos, mods, or platforms.

managed_labels.name: type:build-install
managed_labels.description: Build, packaging, install, or dependency issue.

managed_labels.name: type:question
managed_labels.description: Question that may not require a code change.

managed_labels.name: type:enhancement
managed_labels.description: Improvement to an existing capability.

managed_labels.name: type:refactor
managed_labels.description: Internal cleanup or refactor request.

managed_labels.name: duplicate
managed_labels.description: Issue appears fully or partially covered elsewhere.

managed_labels.name: invalid
managed_labels.description: Report does not describe an actionable repository issue.

managed_labels.name: needs-info
managed_labels.description: More information is required before maintainers can act.

managed_labels.name: needs-human-review
managed_labels.description: Automation could not safely make the final call.

managed_labels.name: component:audio
managed_labels.description: Audio backend, devices, mixing, or sound diagnostics.

managed_labels.name: component:build
managed_labels.description: Build system, dependencies, packaging, or installation.

managed_labels.name: component:console
managed_labels.description: Console UI, input, or console interaction behavior.

managed_labels.name: component:display

managed_labels.name: component:docs
managed_labels.description: Project documentation or guides.

managed_labels.name: component:renderer-glx

managed_labels.name: component:renderer-vulkan
